flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Midwest Institute fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (223 → 177).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 12 pp at Midwest Institute vs the 2003–2007 baseline (65.2% vs 76.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Midwest Institute rose 11% between 2002 and 2005 ($8.6k → $9.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Midwest Institute rose 11% between 2002 and 2005 ($8.6k → $9.6k).
